overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing a character in Western attire walking through a rainy rural landscape toward a farm. The character traverses grassy fields, passes other riders on horseback, and approaches a wooden farm building surrounded by cornfields.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with pond and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a large rock and tree in the distance

entered.detail: small body of water reflecting the gray sky, surrounded by reeds
boulder-sized gray rock sitting in the grassy field
tall green grass with white wildflowers swaying in the wind
narrow muddy trail cutting through the grass
single tree with full green canopy leaning slightly

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open grassland under overcast skies. A pond sits to the left while a large rock and tree mark the path ahead. The ground is wet from recent rain, with tall grass and wildflowers covering the landscape.

events.description: two riders on horseback approach from ahead on the right side of the path
riders on horseback pass by the character on the right at close range

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as two horse riders approach and pass by

notable_agents.action: two riders on horseback galloping past the character on the path

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts marking a distant boundary line

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a clearer dirt path, leaving the large rock behind. Two riders on horseback appear in the distance and gallop past on the right side. The landscape remains open with distant fence posts visible on the left.

events.description: text label 'Crawdad Farm' appears in the lower right corner identifying the location

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the wooden farm building visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden barn or farmhouse with sloped roof and chimney
rows of tall corn stalks growing in cultivated earth

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a farmstead identified by on-screen text as 'Crawdad Farm.' A wooden barn becomes visible ahead while a cornfield appears on the right. The path remains muddy and the sky stays overcast.

agents.ego_description: walking along the path beside the cornfield, approaching the wooden farm building and fence

entered.detail: split-rail wooden fence bordering the cornfield
cluster of gray rocks beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character nears the farm building, walking alongside a wooden fence that borders the cornfield. The barn is now close ahead, and the path shows signs of frequent use with muddy ruts. The environment feels more enclosed as the character enters the farm proper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy rural landscape that transitions from open grasslands into the enclosed grounds of a farmstead. It begins with the character walking through wet, wildflower-covered fields past a pond and a large rock under overcast skies. As the character moves onto a clearer dirt path, the scene opens up to reveal two riders on horseback galloping past on the right against a backdrop of distant fence posts. The perspective then shifts toward the approaching Crawdad Farm, where a wooden barn emerges ahead and a cornfield begins to border the right side of the muddy trail. Finally, the environment feels increasingly enclosed as the camera follows the character alongside a wooden fence and through muddy ruts toward the farm building.
